overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern penthouse apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring an infinity pool with panoramic city views and an interior zen garden. The footage showcases high-end ray-traced graphics with natural sunlight streaming through floor-to-ceiling glass windows and red neon accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse infinity pool deck with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the edge of the infinity pool, admiring the futuristic cityscape through the floor-to-ceiling windows

entered.detail: rectangular infinity pool with clear blue water reflecting the sky and surrounding architecture
floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing a futuristic cityscape with skyscrapers and distant mountains
white cushioned lounge bed with wooden base positioned beside the pool for relaxation
red neon light strips running along the ceiling edges providing ambient accent lighting
warm-toned wooden decking surrounding the pool area with smooth finish

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious penthouse infinity pool with stunning floor-to-ceiling glass windows overlooking a futuristic cityscape. The camera moves slowly along the wooden deck, passing white lounge beds while red neon accent lights glow overhead. Natural sunlight streams through the glass, creating sharp shadows on the deck and water surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse zen garden with glass ceiling

events.description: turns corner from poolside city view to interior zen garden area with planted trees and stone walls

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the pool edge, now facing the interior garden wall with sculpted trees under a glass ceiling

entered.detail: sculpted trees and shrubs in raised planters against the back wall creating a zen garden atmosphere
grid-patterned glass ceiling allowing natural light to flood the interior garden space
textured stone or concrete feature wall with vertical lines behind the garden
vertical red neon light strips mounted on the stone wall providing accent illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera turns the corner into a serene zen garden area featuring sculpted trees in planters against a textured stone wall. A grid-patterned glass ceiling allows bright natural light to illuminate the space, while vertical red neon strips provide accent lighting. The infinity pool remains visible to the left as the camera moves along the wooden deck, transitioning from the city view to this more enclosed, garden-like atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sun-drenched infinity pool area into a secluded, atmospheric zen garden. It begins by gliding along a wooden deck beside the pool, where natural sunlight streams through floor-to-ceiling glass windows to cast sharp shadows across white lounge beds and a futuristic cityscape. As the camera moves forward, the wide urban vista begins to recede, guided by the glow of red neon accent lights overhead. The scene then shifts as the camera turns a corner, transitioning from the open waterfront to an enclosed space featuring sculpted trees and a textured stone wall. Finally, the view opens up toward a grid-patterned glass ceiling that floods the garden with bright light while the infinity pool remains visible in the periphery.
